core_mechanism: a group-equivariant intertwining map that conjugates the action of a Lie group into a fractional-linear (Möbius) transformation group over a non-commutative division algebra (quaternions)
brief_reason: The abstract states that a quaternionic conformal map intertwines between a local unitary subgroup of Sp(2) and the quaternionic Möbius transformation, i.e. it establishes an equivariant correspondence linearizing one group action as fractional-linear (Möbius) transformations over the quaternions.
